title: T-049 — UI: waste analytics + downtime + OEE foundation screens (SCR-08-04 / SCR-08-05 / SCR-08-07)
prompt:
# T-049 — Waste / Downtime / OEE foundation screens UI

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-04, SCR-08-05, SCR-08-07 (08-PROD foundation boundary), §6 D5/D6/D7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/new-screens.jsx:4-209 (waste_analytics_screen); production/other-screens.jsx:4-121 (oee_screen), :124-212 (downtime_screen); production/modals.jsx:31-79 (pause_line_modal), :147-166 (waste_modal), :290-304 (resume_line_modal)

## Goal
Build the three analytics surfaces (waste/downtime/OEE foundation) with prototype-parity charts (Recharts + accessible table fallbacks), URL-driven filters, and the three associated modals (pause line, resume line, log waste). OEE screen renders the 08-PROD foundation view only; advanced analytics remain owned by 15-OEE per §8.1 SCR-08-07 boundary.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/production/waste/page.tsx (RSC) — waste_analytics_screen parity: 4 KPI tiles (rolling-14d window query from `wo_waste_log`, resolving BL-PROD-02), Pareto BarChart (GROUP BY category), trend LineChart with target line from `prod_settings.waste_target_pct`, by-line table, paginated events list; filters `?cat=&line=&from=&to=` via URL params; Export CSV Server Action.
2. apps/web/app/production/downtime/page.tsx (RSC) — downtime_screen parity: Pareto BarChart colored by 4P group (Plant/Process/People), distribution summary card with %, paginated events table with search + category filter via URL params, `Log downtime` opens pause_line_modal.
3. apps/web/app/production/oee/page.tsx (RSC) — oee_screen parity (foundation only): 4 gauges (Plant/A/P/Q), by-line table, 7-day sparkline per line, performance/quality loss cards; period toggle Today/7d/30d via URL params; `Go to 15-OEE` cross-link in nav for advanced analytics.
4. apps/web/components/production/downtime-modals.tsx ('use client') — pause_line_modal + resume_line_modal + waste_modal as shadcn Dialogs with zod-validated forms (4P category required for pause, ≥5 char reason, optional photo for waste); calls existing Server Actions from T-017/T-018/T-030.
5. Literal `data-prototype-label` markers: `waste_analytics_screen`, `downtime_screen`, `oee_screen`, `pause_line_modal`, `resume_line_modal`, `waste_modal`.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the waste/downtime/OEE screens render with prototype-shaped data, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/new-screens.jsx:4-209 and other-screens.jsx:4-212, then per-screen parity holds (KPI tiles + Pareto + trend + by-line + events list for waste; Pareto + distribution + events for downtime; 4 gauges + by-line + breakdown cards for OEE) — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist + visible `data-prototype-label` markers.
2. Given the pause-line modal is opened, when the operator submits without picking a 4P category or with reason shorter than 5 chars, then zod rejects with localised error message and no server call is made.
3. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts for waste, downtime, OEE screens and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (or documented blocker + RTL/snapshot fallback) and confirms accessible chart fallback tables.

## Test strategy
- RED: apps/web/app/production/__tests__/analytics-screens.test.tsx + apps/web/components/production/__tests__/downtime-modals.test.tsx asserting per-screen parity, URL-driven filters, modal zod validation, rolling-14d query usage and `data-prototype-label` markers before code exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run apps/web/app/production/__tests__/analytics-screens.test.tsx apps/web/components/production/__tests__/downtime-modals.test.tsx`
- For UI parity, capture screenshots + Playwright trace; attach paths.
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode rolling-14d window stats — must query `wo_waste_log` (resolves BL-PROD-02).
- Do not render advanced OEE analytics (EWMA, six-big-losses) — those belong to 15-OEE.
- Do not skip accessible chart fallback tables (axe/contrast).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn primitives + Recharts.

pipeline_inputs.description: Waste analytics + downtime + OEE foundation surfaces with URL-driven filters, Recharts + a11y table fallbacks, and pause/resume/waste modals; OEE advanced analytics stays in 15-OEE.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity against prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/new-screens.jsx:4-209 (waste_analytics_screen), other-screens.jsx:4-121 (oee_screen), :124-212 (downtime_screen), modals.jsx:31-79/147-166/290-304 (pause/waste/resume). Rolling-14d window query resolves BL-PROD-02. Pareto+trend charts use Recharts with accessible table fallback. URL-driven filters via `?cat=&line=&from=&to=&period=`. Advanced OEE analytics (EWMA / six-big-losses) explicitly out-of-scope per §8.1 SCR-08-07 boundary. UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Do not implement 15-OEE advanced analytics (EWMA / six-big-losses)
Do not implement shift/line detail/analytics hub/settings (T-050)
Do not change wo_waste_log / downtime_events / oee_snapshots schema
Do not implement Puppeteer PDF export (BL-RPT-04)

Given the pause-line modal is opened, when operator submits without a 4P category or with reason <5 chars, then zod rejects with localised error and no server call is made.

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts for waste, downtime, OEE and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (or documented blocker + RTL/snapshot fallback) plus accessible chart fallback tables.

For UI parity, capture screenshots and Playwright trace/video/artifacts; attach paths in closeout.
